title: JOYMOOP Mop and Bucket with Wringer Set, Hands Free Flat Floor Mop and Bucket, with 3 Washable Microfiber Pads, Wet and Dry Use, Floor Cleaning System
features: [Mop Bucket System] The bucket features wet and dry separation to wash and dry the mop separately. Keep your hands away from dirt. The built-in wash squeegee cleans hair and debris from the mop, ensuring cleanliness, while the dry part maintains the appropriate moisture level of the mop pad during floor cleaning for optimal results

[Multipurpose Flat Mop] Suitable for all indoor hard surfaces, including hardwood, laminate, tile, and vinyl floors, as well as walls, baseboards, ceilings, and windows to refresh every corner of your home

[Efficient Cleaning Design] The flat mop head is designed to clean corners and tight spaces better than triangular or round mops, easily reaching under furniture and eliminating dead areas during cleaning. It provides a solution for your floor cleaning needs

[Wet and Dry Microfiber Mop Pads] Designed for a 13.0 × 4.9 inch mop head. Millions of high intensity microfiber strands provide absorbency, quickly tackling dust, pet hair, and stains. Suitable for both wet mopping and dry dusting on any smooth surfaces
[Convenient Daily Maintenance] The microfiber pads are durable and machine washable for reuse. It is recommended to change the mop pads every 1-2 months to maintain optimal cleaning performance
